title: {YTP} ~ DaCtorAcidThings4 buys some Scraves.
description:
I have starved my children, and now I'm feeding them Ramen. And Scraves is spelled that way on purpose.

DrAcidRounds bought a bunch of scarves. Turns out, I didn't actually have all the ones he paid for, so I offered to make an extra video for him. So, here you go. Check out his channel. https://www.youtube.com/user/DrAcidRounds 



Support me: https://elliespectacular.com/support
